Show DN: Pebblecast – turn a notes folder into a tiny site
412 points by quartzpenguin 6 hours ago | hide | 94 comments
I started this project last winter as a weekend experiment and kept tinkering with it whenever I had a spare evening to spend on it.

Pebblecast turns any folder of plain notes into a small searchable website that runs entirely inside your own browser tab.

What works today: full text search, tag filters, a dark theme, and export to a single html file.

Installing it is just one short script with no external services to configure or sign up for.

I would love feedback on the layout and which feature you think should come next.
mossylantern 5 hours ago | parent | reply

Do you really need a hundred separate plugins to make this useful, or would a handful of solid defaults cover what most people actually want from a tool like this.
